transcript: [singing] Is your heart... [laughs] filled with pain? / Should I come back... [laughing] Tell me dear, are you lonesome... [laughing] Oh lord, help me! [laughing] You know, someone said "the world's a stage, and we each must play a part." [laughing] I... [bursts into laughter] Oh, God! Oh man, that's great... [laughs] Woo! [laughing] I had no cause to doubt you... [laughing] Oh! Thank you baby... thank you, baby! [laughs] Shall I come back again? / Tell me dear, are you lonesome... [laughing] tonight? / Is your heart filled with pain? Shall I come back again? / Tell me dear... [laughs] Are you lonesome tonight? [laughing]
Phew! That's it, man. Fifteen years right down the drain, boy, I tell you. [laughs] Fourteen years, just shot right there, man. I tell ya.
